description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test 'pip' Package that runs on every push to dev and main branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12) with different pytest flags. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python with caching for pip, installs ISOFIT and its dependencies, downloads extras if necessary, and executes tests using pytest.
